zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Kerdeston於1330年出生在英國諾福爾可可爾迪斯頓時，她的父親William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston28歲，母親Margaret Cobold20歲。她於1347年12月8日之前與William de Tendring在英國諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1394年在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德享年64歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可素德波利哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Kerdeston于1330年出生在英国諾福爾可可爾迪斯頓时，她的父亲William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston28岁，母亲Margaret Cobold20岁。她于1347年12月8日之前与William de Tendring在英国諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1394年在英国素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德享年64岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可素德波利哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Kerdeston was born in 1330, in Kerdiston, Norfolk, England, her father, William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston, was 28 and her mother, Margaret Cobold, was 20. She married William de Tendring before 8 December 1347, in Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1394, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in All Saints' Church, Sudbury, Suffolk, England.

Elle a épousé William de Tendring avant 8 décembre 1347, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1394, à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à All Saints' Church, Sudbury, Suffolk, Angleterre.

Dezember 1347 in Norfolk, England William de Tendring geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Lei sposato William de Tendring prima del 8 dicembre 1347, nel Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1394, nel Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a All Saints' Church, Sudbury, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Kerdestonが1330年にイギリスノーフォルクケルディストンで生まれた時，父William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdestonは28歳，母Margaret Coboldは20歳であった。1347年12月8日以前にイギリスノーフォルクでWilliam de Tendringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1394年にイギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドで64歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクスドブリーアル サイントス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints' Church, Sudbury, Suffolk, En: 영국 수폴크 수드버이 앨 세인츠' c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Kerdeston(이)가 1330년 영국 노르폴크 커디스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Cobold(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1347년 12월 8일 이전 영국 노르폴크에서 William de Tendring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1394년 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 수드버이 앨 세인츠' c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Kerdeston nasceu em 1330, em Kerdiston, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Cobold, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Tendring antes 8 de dezembro de 1347, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1394, em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em All Saints' Church, Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.All Saints' Church, Sudbury, Suffolk, En: алл сеинц' чурч, судбури, суффолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Kerdeston родилась в 1330 г. в местности кирдистон, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Cobold, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Tendring перед 8 декабрь 1347 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1394 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности алл сеинц' чурч, судбури, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Kerdeston nació en 1330, en Kerdiston, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William Kerdeston 2nd Lord Kerdeston, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margaret Cobold, tenía 20 años. Se casó con William de Tendring antes de 8 de diciembre de 1347, en Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1394, en Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en All Saints' Church, Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
